product.description:
Description : In love with the old-school style of '80s basketball? Meet the Court Vision. It combines synthetic leather with a rubber cupsole, bringing you all-day comfort inspired by some of the most iconic silhouettes of the past.

Care Instruction : Wipe With Dry Cloth

Color : White

Toe Shape : Round Toe

Occasion : Sports

Pack Contains : 1 Pair of Shoes

Sole Material : EVA

Sports Type : Walking

Insole : Comfort

Ankle Height : Low Top

Cushioning : Medium



Explore the entire range of Footwear available on Nykaa. Shop more Nike products here.You can browse through the complete world of Nike Footwear .
